title: MrFEG's Flashlight
description: MrFeg's Flashlight is a functional utility mod that functional, high-quality Flashlight with various features included to your game
body:
![MrFEG's Flashlight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ff101220e61af0f4bed4f663a65d9e20948a23d.png)



# **MrFeg's Flashlight 🔦**

This Mod Adds Functional Flashlight that allows you to explore the world in an immersive way unlike infinte light sources that you use like torches,laterns etc.......My goal is to provide a high-quality utility that fits perfectly into any survival or horror-themed world.This is just the beginning—I plan to add more variations and features soon, so please support the project!


## **✨ Features**


- **Emissive Textures :** The mod features built-in Optifine compatibility with specific configuration files that enable realistic glowing effects for the flashlight.
- **Functional Flashlight:** Adds a working, toggleable light source to replace standard torches for a more realistic exploration experience.
- **Battery Power System:** The flashlight is not infinite; it requires Batteries to stay powered.
